items.title: MCD or CMG: Which Restaurant Stock Looks Better Positioned Right Now?
items.description: McDonald's value focus, scale advantages and digital strength stand out as Chipotle works through transaction pressure and execution challenges.

items.title: Barclays Analyst A Buy Rating On McDonald’s Corporation (MCD)
items.description: McDonald’s Corporation (NYSE:MCD) is among the 12 Best Performing Dow Stocks in 2025. Barclays analyst Jeff Bernstein kept a Buy rating on McDonald’s Corporation (NYSE:MCD) on December 6 and set a price goal of $358. According to a December 8 CNBC report, starting on January 1, 2026, McDonald’s Corporation (NYSE:MCD) will evaluate franchisees worldwide based […]

items.title: Dividend Income: Lanny's October 2025 Summary
